message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

package "InheritanceDesign" {
  class Bond
  class Stock
  class Car
  class House
  class Wealth
  abstract class Security
  class BankAccount
  abstract class Property
  abstract class Asset
}

package "java" {
  package "lang" {
    annotation Override
  }
}

Bond --|> Security
Stock --|> Security
Car --|> Property
House --|> Property
Security --|> Asset
BankAccount --|> Asset
Property --|> Asset

Bond ..> Override
Stock ..> Override
Car ..> Override
House ..> Override
Wealth ..> Override
Security ..> Override
BankAccount ..> Override
Property ..> Override
Asset ..> Override

@enduml
```
